message:
feat(core): connection management, pager, B-tree, parser, VFS, and SSI validation improvements

- Expand connection management with additional state tracking and configuration options
- Improve pager page allocation and dirty page handling
- Fix B-tree cursor positioning, freelist reclamation, and overflow chain traversal
- Enhance parser lexer tokenization, semantic analysis passes, and token definitions
- Update VFS unix layer with improved file locking and I/O error handling
- Fix SSI validation edge case in MVCC conflict detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
